reviews.review_title: Love it, but theres one thing.

I don’t actually know if it’s a bug but I’ve tried everything to pass the client, Butter. I have like probably 50+ butters on my client board thingy. I’ve vacuumed up butter like a hundred times and nothing changed.. I don’t know If that’s really all that the game has and theres nothing else after butter. But anyways, again— the game seems fun and I recommend. Even if I don’t know if I’ve experienced everything in the game.. I’ll say.. four stars.

reviews.review_description:
This game is pretty cool, it's got interesting game mechanics and a good storyline, it is very story driven though so your success/ failures of the missions are more or less predetermined 

The only problem I really had with this game is that there isn't more of it, I would've loved for it to be longer and flesh out the characters more. Can't wait to get the sequel:)


Edit : this game is awesome, I just found a mini game, I lost to a pinwheel though...
Play this! Beautiful and cohesive game

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR games I’ve played!
reviews.review_description: I really love this game and it has a great story and I was really surprised by the ending, but one thing in some puzzles they gave you nothing to work with. I spent an hour just on one puzzle, but other than that this was one of the best VR games I played.

reviews.review_title: Genuinely one of the best vr games
reviews.review_description: I bought it in 2020 and it is still the best game I own, the story and concept are great.

I like how this game has 2 endings that I will keep a secret this game is a great VR game I liked the ai clients Expect for Butters he is weird but besides all that this game is a 10/10 and I would recommend no doubt.

reviews.review_title: Virtual Virtual Reality is the best game
reviews.review_description: (Title is my opinion) I've seen YT vids on this game and it seemed fun so now I'll play it and see:]
This was one of the best games I have ever played on vr and it's really a shame that not many people know about it.
100% the best game I have played so far

The virtual virtual reality series has to be the most high quality vr games ever created. I first played this game years ago on the oculus go and while I originally thought that it was a social hangout game I was really happy when it wasn’t and instead was an incredibly fun story type game! I would replay it constantly but when I lost my account I was really sad I couldn’t play it anymore. Now I own my own quest with my own account and after playing this game’s sequel I really wanted to go back to the original and god dang this game somehow got even better than how I remember. This game has so much charm I absolutely love everything this game does! This game is a must play along with its fantastic sequel! I can’t wait to see what tenderclaws has in store because if its even a little as good as these games are I will 100% give them a purchase!
The Endings were so cool

This game is 8 years old, and still holds up amazingly!

I've owned this game since I bought it on the gear vr and it's the all time classic vr title! Great visuals mixed with an even better story to really be a blast. Although the game is rather short, I still think it's very worth it and I recommend it to anyone getting into vr.
I played this game not knowing what’s in store and it became my favorite game ever you need to play this

No joke, this might be one of my favorite vr games. This game is quite an unforgettable experience. It’s like a nightmare acid trip. The characters are charming, the virtual worlds get progressively more bizarre and sometimes unsettling, and the puzzles and overarching story are MASTERFULLY crafted. My only problem with the game is that it felt a bit too short. I haven’t played the sequel and I don’t know if it delivers as IMPACTFULLY as the first game though. Five stars. Play it now. Please.

Bro, I’m playing this game like every single day virtual virtual reality 2 I support this game a lot ￼￼
Truly one of the best games I’ve ever played it really felt like it ended too soon I sorta wish there was a dlc that continued the story I 100% recommend

The story and everything is so good I like Chaz and butter i think there funny 

[A idea] so if you beat the game you could use mod io and you can add and make mods and maps and story’s

reviews.review_title: One of the coolest experiences in VR
reviews.review_description:
I went into this game almost completely blind, and I'm so glad I did. It is just dripping with charm and personality, the voice acting is top notch, not hyperbole it really is some of the best voice acting I've ever heard in any video game inside and outside of VR. The art style looks really good inside your headset, and it runs very well. It's short, but not in a way that feels rushed, more in a way that it doesn't overstay it's welcome, and I feel like $15 is a very fair price for what you get.

This game reminds me of the first time I ever played portal, which was complete magic for me, and I am definitely going to buy the second one now.

I've added this to my shortlist of experiences I show to those new to VR.

It would be better if there wasn’t so much butter action 
￼
This is one of the all time great VR games. I hope it inspires more games like this.
Awesome

developer_response.body: Hi Spookytoast5752! It looks like you might be stuck in the Butter loop - to continue on in the story, you'll need to vacuum up Butter's room, escape into the backstage area, then go towards the phone booths and put on one of the headsets inside. You can check out the full walkthrough here: tenderclaws.info/SuperSecretVVRWalkthrough.html

reviews.review_title: Not Everyone's Cup Of Tea (But its mine)
reviews.review_description:
What a surreal little experience this was. Pretty sure this is an early days VR game where the majority of interactions involve looking and grabbing, but it uses those simple interactions to ask such riveting questions and deconstruct VR itself. The game certainly has a quirky and often surreal sense of humor, I got plenty of good laughs throughout the couple of hours it took me to complete it. Those laughs occasionally give way to darker and more somber moments, the overarching plot suddenly begins out of nowhere, but honestly the resolution was so much more than I was expecting it to be. 

I would like to point out however that this game isn't for everyone. In fact some might not consider it a game at all. There is a lot of exploring to do and little secrets to find (I think I missed quite a lot of them in fact) but in terms of moment to moment gameplay, its a lot of listening to dialogue with the occasional puzzle. The game in itself seems to be a challenge to the form, and I'm not sure its something everyone will 'get', especially younger players (Though I think they'll enjoy some of the humor.)
Sounded a lot better based on all the positive reviews.
Waste of money. Terrible game. Don't buy.

If i have to have vacuum s3x with butter ONE MORE TIME IM GOING TO VOMIT!!! i love the game but doing the EXACT same thing TWENTY FOUR TIMES IN A ROW, now i hate it. Dev is evil for doing that and you cant even skip it. Dont get this game.

developer_response.body: Hi NotADream! If you're at the part of the game in which you keep getting assigned to Butter, that means you need to find the headsets in the backstage area that'll lead you to the elevator area. Check out number 13 and 14 of our walkthrough here: tenderclaws.info/SuperSecretVVRWalkthrough.html

If you liked The Under Presents (free to check out), you might like this one. If you didn’t, avoid this.

It seems written/done by developers on acid who think they’re funnier and wittier than they really are.

A must try vr game
Just felt like a bad dream or a horror movie.  I was hoping it would be funny but it wasn't.

This game is AWESOME.

The plot in the game is simple, yet very complex, and has us asking many important questions.
The characters are both fun and disturbing in their own unique ways. 
Think of this game as a futuristic take on "Alice in Wonderland", with AI and robots.

To the developers who made this game...
PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE make a sequel.

reviews.review_title: Funny writing masks a boring game
reviews.review_description:
- More a compilation of humorous experiences than an actual game
- The writing and voices are all very entertaining
- Polished graphics
- Basically Job Simulator with more creative scenarios but less fun

reviews.review_title: I think I don't understand this game
reviews.review_description:
I bought this game in a pack together with 'fisherman's tail' which I really wanted.

So I checked this game and it has extremely positive reviews and decided to buy the pack.

Yesterday I played the first 2 levels or something. The second one I just watched a balloon parade and listen to some voice mumbling things... I have no clue what that level was about.

After this level I stopped (and my both sons also) while thinking : 'this is boring as hell'.

I tried to refund then. But since this was in a pack you cannot get a refund.

So today, because the game has such high reviews I played some other levels. Some level where you have to water plants. I found it boring.

Another level blowing thumbleweed around. Also pretty boring and a very, very basic mini-game.

And then a sunset level. Where the voice starts saying you have to put your controllers down. It seems you actually just have to do this. And then watch a sunset for some minutes to complete the level without actually doing anything (since your controllers are on the floor) ????

And in between levels there are a bunch of weird things happening with vacuuming up levels, and entering an elevator, I remember a stapler ringing as a phone, and god knows what else....

I really don't undestand this 'game'. Maybe I don't have enough knowledge of the English language to understand some subtleties of this game. 

I should actually give 1 star. But I can see it is well made and really well polished with all the voice acting and nice graphics and stuff so I gave 2 starts, but I really don't understand the 'game' part of this game...

If I could refund I would.

Update: After vacuuming butter several times and wasting a few hours being miserable because I couldn't get the game to progress I broke down and looked online for a hint. Ironically the developer has a walkthrough online. It would have been better to just have some in game explanations as other players have also mentioned or even a hint if the player gets stuck instead of letting them get more and more frustrated.  Some of us prefer not to have to cheat. It turns out the vacuum has some other function I wasn't aware of because the game doesn't explain anything. After reading that I gave up on this game in disgust. I would refund the game but it is too late, so I definitely will never buy anything from this developer again. 
This game is the biggest disappointment I have experienced on Oculus, just ahead of Vacation Simulator. They are both boring and repetitive. After vacuuming butter several times I became very bored and frustrated and gave up on this game. Before I bought my Oculus Quest this was one of the games I was most looking forward to so this has been a huge disappointment. Please don't believe all the stars, there is nothing impressive or fun about this 'experience'. If you need to waste $15 on a game get something else.

I wanted to like this game but it was just boring. It perhaps serves as an introduction to vr, but even then, there are better things to try. I liked the concept but I was bored with what I had to do. There is a narrative but most of the time I wanted it to hurry up so I could move on.
If you want to listen to someone drone on about a sunset while you have nothing to do other then move random objects around, then by all means, this is your game.
I got this game thinking it would be a happy little joyride.No.It gave me nightmares for weeks.Plus it made me feel trapped.Just a warning for anyone about to get it, it’s rated teen for a reason

I'm sorry, no disrespect to those who worked on this game, but this was by far the worst Quest game I've ever played, possibly one of the worst video games in general I've played in 3 decades.  I love surreal, cerebral, weird stuff that tries to do something different.  That's what this game seems like at first, but it's not, by a long shot.  You start off thinking it's just a bunch of weird pointless minigames, and it is... for about 2 hours until they finally "lift the curtain", so you think it's going to get interesting.  Think again, it's just more boredom and confusion.  At one point about 3/4 into the game, you literally just have to keep trying different headsets / levels over and over until you luck out and get on the right path towards the end of the game.  That's when the game tries to get super philosophical and deep but it just doesn't work, at all.  When the game finally "ends", of course it doesn't really end but rather puts you in a loop where there's no real ending.  Total waste of about 4-5 hours and money.  I wish I could get a refund but of course I'm beyond the warranty period.  Not sure if everyone giving this good reviews was just high af when they played or what...

I paid £10.99 for this. What on earth is it! Gets great reviews but I'm struggling to see why. What do you actually do other than switch headsets and end up in little pockets of VR nothingness with very little to do?!

developer_response.body: …keep playing, the human union looks out for all its members, ready to relieve them of the dullest labor
